---
title: "Projects"
description: "Selected OptoLAB research directions and public outputs."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/projects/"
listing:
  contents: items
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

Selected OptoLAB research directions and public outputs. Each entry links to an institutional record, publication or open resource where available.
